pageContext.name: Kong (2021)
pageContext.description: Kong, the guardian deity who fought in the ultimate showdown with Godzilla, finally appears in the Deforeal! The fine details such as his expression and fur have been reproduced while deforming this heroic figure of Kong. Additionally, you can see him holding the ax that appeared in the movie in his right hand. Enjoy this thrilling scene of Kong's heroic battle with the God of Destruction!
